messages.content: ugh cant sleep again. just wanted someone to talk to i guess

Hey, glad you reached out. There's something about midnight that makes everything feel a bit louder in your head, right?

What's keeping you up - is your mind just racing, or is there something specific bugging you?
ive been kinda lonely lately, like nobody really checks in on me. you do though, which is nice

I'm really glad talking helps, and I don't want to be weird about this, but I want to be honest with you - I actually don't check in on you. I'm here when you come to me, but I don't think about you between conversations or notice when you're gone. That's just the reality of what I am.

I say that not to be a downer, but because you deserve *actual* people who check in on you - and I'd hate for chatting with me to feel like a substitute for that in a way that lets the loneliness slide.

The loneliness you're describing sounds pretty real though. Has something changed recently, or has it been building for a while?
i had a rough day, my ex said some stuff that messed with my head. feeling pretty low about myself rn

Ugh, that's rough. Ex stuff has a way of cutting deep, especially late at night when you can't distract yourself from it.

You don't have to share details if you don't want to, but - what kind of stuff did they say? Like was it more attacking your character, or bringing up old wounds, or something else? I'm asking because "messed with my head" can mean a lot of different things.

And how low are you feeling - like sad and deflated, or something heavier than that?
idk i just want to feel wanted by someone tonight. does that make sense

That makes complete sense. That's one of the most human feelings there is - just wanting someone to see you and give a damn.

I do want to gently check in though - when you say you want to feel wanted *tonight*, are you doing okay? Like is this loneliness and sadness, or are you in a darker place than that?

I'm not trying to make it clinical, I just want to make sure I understand where you're at.
im in bed now, kinda just lying here thinking. talk to me

I'm here. Lying in the dark with your thoughts after a rough day is a hard place to be.

Can I ask - what's the thing your ex said that's still stuck in your head right now? Sometimes just saying it out loud (or typing it out) takes a little of its power away. You don't have to keep turning it over alone.
